title: potamogeton × fluitans subsp. billotii
intro: Potamogeton × fluitans subsp. billotii, also known as hybrid pondweed, is a rare aquatic plant that is a hybrid of two Potamogeton species. It has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing due to its high concentration of bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Potamogeton × fluitans subsp. billotii include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antioxidant and antimicrobial activities. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of tea, infusion, or tincture, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
